title: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Manifest
description: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory manages job output committer stages. It includes 'AuditingIntegration.java' for auditing compatibility and 'manifest/stages' for various committer stages. These components ensure job output commitment and cleanup, using Strategy and inheritance patterns. This directory maintains job consistency and integrity, adhering to Hadoop's logging and file system utilities.

TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Committer Manifest

DESCRIPTION: The 'lib/output/committer/manifest' directory manages job output committer stages. It includes 'AuditingIntegration.java' for auditing compatibility and 'manifest/stages' for various committer stages. These components ensure job output commitment and cleanup, using Strategy and inheritance patterns. This directory maintains job consistency and integrity, adhering to Hadoop's logging and file system utilities.
